verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah cina-in si dektak hi. Tua ciangin Amoz' tapa kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Na innkuan vai ding hawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na si ding hi; na damkikzo kei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah in a mai kawm lam ngatin Topa tungah thu ngen a

“Nangma mai-ah thuman tak leh ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ka gamtatna, leh nangma muhna-ah a hoih ka sepna thu tu-in hong phawk in, kong thum hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah nakpi takin a kap hi
Tua ciangin inntual laita panin Isaiah a paikhiat ma-in ama tungah Topa' thu hong tung hi

“Kileh kik in la keima mite' makai Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na thungetna ka za khin a, na khituite ka mu khin hi. En in, nang kong damsak ding a, ni thum ni-in Topa' biakinn-ah na paito ding hi

Na nuntakna kum sawmlenga sung kong behlap ding hi. Assiria kumpipa khutsung panin nangmah leh hih khuapi ka honkhia ding a, keima hang leh ka nasempa David hangin hih khuapi ka hu ding hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Theimoh khat hong la un. Amah a damkik theihna dingin tuate la un la, a uilut nuh un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “ Topa in kei hong damsakna ding, leh a ni thum ni-in Topa' biakinn-ah ka paitohna ding a lim bang hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “ Topa in a ciamsa thu hong hihna dingin Topa' tung panin nangma tungah a lim hih bang hi ding hi: A liim kal sawm maipai ding hiam, ahih kei leh kal sawm nungkik ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah in dawngin, “Liim kal sawm a mai nawt ding a baih khat ahi hi; liim kal sawm nungkiksak zaw in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa tungah kamsangpa Isaiah kiko hi. Tua ciangin amah in Ahaz' ni-nai tungah a ni tumsa a liim kal sawm lehkaih kik hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Hezekiah in Babylon pana Kamtaite Saang

verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Babylon kumpipa, Baladan' tapa Merodakbaladan in Hezekiah kiangah laikhakte leh letsong khat tawh kamtaite a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hezekiah a ci na hi, ci-in amah in za hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in amaute na zindo a, amah in amaute kiangah a vankoihna inn khempeuh, ngun, kham, a namtui nate, sathau manpha, a galvan, leh a vankoihna innte-ah a om khempeuh a lak hi. Ama innsung hita leh ama gamsung khempeuh pan hita leh Hezekiah in amaute a lahloh omlo hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiangah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Hih mite in bang gen ahi hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah in, “Amaute, Babylon gam, a gamlapi panin hong pai uh hi,” a ci hi

Amah in, “Amaute in na inn sungah bang mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah in dawngin, “Amaute in ka innsunga om khempeuh mu uh hi; ka vankoihna innsungte panin amaute ka lahloh bangmah omlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “ Topa' thu za in
En in, na innsunga om khempeuh leh na pu na pate in tuni donga a kholte Babylon-ah a kipuak ni ding hong tung ding hi; bangmah kisitlo ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Nangma sung pan a suak na tapate pawlkhat kilakhia ding a, amaute pen Babylon kumpipa inn sungah innsung maangte hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Na gensa ahi Topa' thugen a hoih hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keima hun sungin kilemna leh lungmuan'na a om nak leh bang phamawh ding ahi hiam?” ci-in ngaihsun hi.
Hezekiah' sepna a omlaite, a vangliatna, leh tuili leh tuilakna bawlin khuapi sungah tui a tutna, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a, ama tangin a tapa Manasseh in a uk hi.
